rationale: In the citing article, Grinstein and Kronrod (2016) appears only as an illustrative reference in example lists (e.g., a university HR partner and a note about possible time-of-month effects on saving behavior). The paper does not discuss that study's theory, design, or findings in detail, and it does not build arguments or methodological recommendations specifically on it. Its function is therefore a passing background/example citation within a broad methodological commentary on field experiments.
